title: RunArtifact
description: Unified artifact shape for every run on the synthetic environment platform. Emitted by Python copies runs, TypeScript worlds runs, parameter sweeps, and evaluation runs. One file per run: <run_dir>/artifact.json.

run_id.description: UUID4 hex (no dashes, 32 chars). Primary key in the run registry.

kind.description: Which kind of run this is. Drives dispatch in consumers.

config.description: JSON-serializable inputs to the run (scenario ID, generator name + params, etc.). Free-form per kind; consumers inspect based on 'kind'.

seed.description: Integer RNG seed used for the run, or null if a seed is not meaningful (e.g. evaluation over an existing corpus).

artifact_paths.description: Logical name -> path relative to the run directory. Example: {'telemetry': 'run.jsonl', 'scorecard': 'scorecard.json'}. Relative so runs stay portable.

summary.description: Headline numbers safe to index in the UI without loading bulk artifacts (e.g. {'fidelity_score': 0.87, 'n_ticks': 2048}).

provenance.description: Reproducibility record. Accepts the synthetic.contracts.Provenance shape (copies runs) OR the worlds-runner provenance shape. Both have: generator_name, version/generator_version, seed, created_at, params. Worlds additionally: scenario_name, scenario. Copies additionally: source_id.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp (seconds precision). Indexed by the registry for recency queries.
